name: Climbing Stairs
description: You are climbing a staircase. It takes n steps to reach the top. Each time you can either climb 1 or 2 steps. In how many distinct ways can you climb to the top?

name: Frog Jump (Cost)
description: A frog wants to climb from the 0th stair to the (n-1)th stair. The frog can jump 1 or 2 steps at a time. The cost of a jump is abs(height[i] - height[j]). Find the minimum cost to reach the last stair.
python_template:
def frogJump(heights: list[int]) -> int:
    pass

name: Minimal Cost (K jumps)
description: A frog can jump from stair i to any stair from i+1 to i+k. The cost of jumping from i to j is abs(height[i] - height[j]). Find the minimum cost to reach the last stair from the first.
python_template:
def minimalCost(heights: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    pass

name: House Robber
description: You are a robber planning to rob houses along a street. Each house has a certain amount of money. Adjacent houses have security systems connected — if two adjacent houses are broken into the same night, the police will be alerted. Find the maximum amount of money you can rob without alerting the police.

name: House Robber II
description: Same as House Robber, but all houses are arranged in a circle. The first and last house are adjacent. Find the maximum amount you can rob without robbing two adjacent houses.

name: Ninja's Training
description: A ninja has a training plan for n days. Each day he can perform one of 3 activities, earning points[i][0], points[i][1], or points[i][2]. He cannot perform the same activity on two consecutive days. Find the maximum points he can earn.
python_template:
def ninjaTraining(points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
    pass

name: Unique Paths
description: A robot is at the top-left corner of an m x n grid. It can only move right or down. How many unique paths are there to reach the bottom-right corner?
go_template:
func uniquePaths(m int, n int) int {

}

name: Unique Paths II (Obstacles)
description: Same as Unique Paths but now the grid has obstacles. An obstacle is marked as 1, free space as 0. Find the number of unique paths from top-left to bottom-right.
constraints: m == grid.length, n == grid[i].length, 1 <= m, n <= 100

name: Triangle Min Path Sum
description: Given a triangle array, find the minimum path sum from top to bottom. Each step you may move to an adjacent number on the row below (i.e., index i or i+1 of the next row).

name: Minimum Falling Path Sum
description: Given an n x n matrix, find the minimum sum of a falling path. A falling path starts at any element in the first row and moves to the element directly below, or diagonally left/right below.

name: Cherry Pickup II
description: Given a grid of chocolates, two robots start at the top-left and top-right corners. Each robot moves down one row per step (down, down-left, or down-right). Both collect chocolates in their cell (shared cell counted once). Find the maximum total chocolates collected.
constraints: rows == grid.length, cols == grid[i].length, 2 <= rows, cols <= 70

name: Partition Equal Subset Sum
description: Given an integer array nums, return true if you can partition the array into two subsets such that the sum of elements in both subsets is equal.

name: Partition Array for Min Sum Diff
description: Partition an array into two subsets such that the absolute difference of their sums is minimized. Return the minimum difference.

name: Coin Change (Min Coins)
description: Given coins of different denominations and a total amount, return the fewest number of coins needed to make up that amount. Return -1 if it cannot be made.

name: Target Sum
description: Given an array of integers and a target, assign + or - to each element such that the sum equals target. Return the number of ways to achieve this.

name: Coin Change II (Count Ways)
description: Given coins of different denominations and a total amount, return the number of combinations that make up that amount. You have infinite supply of each coin.

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: Given an array prices where prices[i] is the price on day i, find the maximum profit from one buy and one sell. You must buy before you sell.

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
description: You can buy and sell multiple times (one transaction at a time). Find the maximum profit.

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock III
description: You can complete at most 2 transactions. Find the maximum profit. You cannot hold more than one share at a time.

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV
description: You may complete at most k transactions. Find the maximum profit.

name: Buy and Sell with Cooldown
description: You can do multiple transactions but after selling you must wait one day before buying again (cooldown). Find the maximum profit.

name: Buy and Sell with Transaction Fee
description: You can do multiple transactions but must pay a transaction fee for each sale. Find the maximum profit.

name: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Given an integer array nums, return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

name: Print Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Given an integer array, find and print the actual longest increasing subsequence (not just the length).

name: Largest Divisible Subset
description: Given a set of distinct positive integers, find the largest subset such that every pair (a, b) satisfies a % b == 0 or b % a == 0.

name: Number of Longest Increasing Subsequences
description: Given an integer array nums, return the number of longest increasing subsequences.

name: Longest Bitonic Subsequence
description: A bitonic subsequence first increases then decreases. Given an array, find the length of the longest bitonic subsequence.

    pass

name: Longest String Chain
description: Given a list of words, find the longest chain where each word is formed by adding exactly one letter to the previous word. Words can be reordered.

name: Matrix Chain Multiplication

name: Minimum Cost to Cut a Stick
description: Given a wooden stick of length n and an array of cut positions, find the minimum total cost. The cost of each cut is the length of the stick being cut.

name: Burst Balloons
description: Given n balloons with numbers on them, burst them to maximize coins. When you burst balloon i, you get nums[left]*nums[i]*nums[right] coins.

name: Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
description: Given an m x n binary matrix, return the total number of square submatrices that have all ones.
